header.tagline: Web3 decentralized marketplace for virtual goods

homepage.title: SapMall DApp
homepage.subtitle: Decentralized E-commerce Platform
homepage.description: Experience decentralized e-commerce ecosystem and enjoy the new shopping experience brought by Web3
homepage.ready: System is ready, waiting for feature modules configuration...
homepage.rewardsDesc: Campaigns & rewards; Bags participation uses Solana on their site
homepage.daoDesc: Join governance, discussions, and community initiatives

rewards.title: Ecosystem
rewards.intro: Campaigns, rewards, and Bags links are aggregated here. Use your connected EVM wallet for shopping and checkout; more features will ship iteratively.
rewards.walletExplainer: Shopping-only users only need an EVM wallet. If you join on-chain activities on Bags, you will connect a Solana wallet on bags.fm and approve prompts there—it is separate from the EVM login and cannot replace it. Skip Solana if you skip these activities.
rewards.plannedHint: Task claims and reward summaries are on the roadmap; keep contributing via DAO and community programs—we will surface benefits here when ready.
rewards.heroSubtitle: Official campaigns, Bags partnerships, and community rewards—earn contribution points, limited NFTs, and platform perks.
rewards.walletNoticeLine1: 1. Shopping and checkout on Sapphire Mall only require an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask).
rewards.walletNoticeLine2: 2. For on-chain programs on Bags, connect a Solana wallet on bags.fm and approve prompts there.
rewards.walletNoticeLine3: 3. EVM and Solana sessions are independent and cannot replace each other. Skip Solana if you skip Bags-only activities.

campaignDetail.notFound: Campaign not found—it may have ended or the link is invalid.
campaignDetail.claimSuccess: Claim recorded (demo). Head to the marketplace to use your perk.

walletHints.evm: This campaign requires an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask) on Sapphire Mall.
walletHints.solana: Join on Bags with a Solana wallet—separate from your EVM session on the mall.
walletHints.evm_optional: Connect an EVM wallet to track task progress; some node tasks can be previewed without it.

newbie-wallet.title: First wallet connection perk
newbie-wallet.desc: New users who connect an EVM wallet and pass verification receive a 10 USDT first-order voucher.
rules: For new Sapphire Mall accounts only; one claim per user.
Requires an EVM wallet and identity verification.
Voucher expires 7 days after claim and is non-transferable.
steps: Connect MetaMask or another EVM wallet and sign in.
Complete identity verification in account settings.
Return here to claim, then apply the voucher at checkout.

sap-pay-bonus.title: SAP checkout bonus
sap-pay-bonus.desc: Pay with SAP for extra fee rebates and spend-back rewards during the promo window.
rules: Only orders paid with SAP during the campaign count.
Rebates are paid in SAP; rates shown at checkout apply.
Wash trading or abuse voids eligibility.
steps: Hold enough SAP in your connected wallet.
Shop on the marketplace and choose SAP at payment.
Rebates appear instantly in this demo; production uses backend settlement.

referral.title: Sapphire referral partner
referral.desc: Invite friends to complete their first trade—earn 20% of their lifetime trading fees.
rules: Invitees must register via your link and complete a qualifying first trade.
Commission rate is fixed at 20% per settlement cycle.
Self-referrals and fraud are prohibited.
steps: Get your referral link from the help center.
Share it and guide friends through signup.
Commissions accrue after their first trade (demo).

node-mining.title: Contribution mining
node-mining.desc: Complete daily sharing and review tasks to grow contribution tiers and unlock fee discounts.
rules: Daily caps apply; duplicate spam does not count.
Contribution points apply only to this program—not a global wallet.
Tier benefits activate next settlement cycle.
steps: Open DAO / community tasks for today's quests.
Finish sharing, reviews, or listed interactions.
Check your tier and fee discount details.

dao-may.title: May governance vote
dao-may.desc: Vote on next-quarter virtual goods categories. Participants share a 5,000 SAP reward pool.
rules: Valid governance weight required; see DAO page for thresholds.
One vote per address per proposal.
Rewards ship within 7 business days after close (demo).
steps: Connect an EVM wallet and open DAO governance.
Read the proposal and pick an option.
Submit your vote per the DAO flow.

bags-blindbox.title: Bags collab mystery box on Solana
bags-blindbox.desc: Connect a Solana wallet on Bags to claim your Web3 blind box—badges and shop vouchers inside.
rules: Runs on Bags only; Solana wallet required.
Box contents and rarity are shown on Bags.
Sapphire Mall never custodies Solana keys or assets.
steps: Tap Open on Bags to visit bags.fm.
Connect Solana and approve prompts.
View claimed boxes in your Bags account.

bags-creator.title: Bags creator week: NFT mint
bags-creator.desc: Launch your art project on Bags with traffic support and secondary liquidity narratives from Sapphire Mall.
rules: Creators must mint through Bags workflows.
Submissions must meet content guidelines.
Promo slots are limited and subject to review.
steps: Create a creator profile on Bags with Solana connected.
Upload work and mint your NFT.
Submit the support application on Bags.

summer-preview.title: Summer ecosystem teaser
summer-preview.desc: Multi-chain creators meet Bags Launch—details drop before go-live.
rules: Teaser only—claims not open yet.
Full rules update when the campaign goes live.
Watch official announcements for the start time.
steps: Bookmark this page or subscribe to alerts (demo).
Return when live for full rules.
Join on Bags following the published flow.

staking-preview.title: Exchange & staking preview week
staking-preview.desc: Preview exchange flows and task systems—complete the survey for an early badge raffle.
rules: Survey and docs only during teaser; staking ships later.
Early badges are limited and raffled.
EVM wallet required to submit the survey.
steps: Visit Exchange to learn the SAP swap flow.
Connect wallet and finish the preview survey.
Wait for go-live to claim badges.

spring-ended.title: Spring Bags airdrop (closed)
spring-ended.desc: Thanks for participating—watch this page for the next season.
rules: Campaign closed; no new entries.
Past claims remain visible on Bags.
Next season will be announced separately.
steps: No action needed—event is over.
Check Bags for historical claims.
Follow this hub for upcoming campaigns.

rewards.futureDesc: Automated task claims and reward summaries are in development. Keep contributing via DAO votes and community quests—points will reconcile when the modules launch.
rewards.featureLeaderboardDesc: Highlight top contributors with bonus drops
rewards.subscribeDesc: Leave your email for campaign and airdrop alerts (demo).
rewards.subscribeToast: Subscriptions are coming soon—thanks for your interest.
rewards.heroHint: Connect an EVM wallet for on-site campaigns. Bags partners require Solana on bags.fm — the two are separate.
rewards.myActivityEmpty: Claimed campaigns appear here (local demo only).

hero.tagline: Decentralized swap · Secure · Fast · Low fees
hero.title: Swap for SAP
hero.subtitle: Swap mainstream stablecoins for SAP—lower fees when you shop, merchant perks, and early access to ecosystem campaigns.

hints.walletRequired: Wallet not connected. Connect to swap or pay a deposit.
hints.depositLocked: No pending deposit—the deposit tab stays locked.

deposit.title: Merchant security deposit
deposit.subtitle: Pay before the deadline or the request expires.
deposit.footnote: This flow links from Admin. On-chain confirmation follows backend callbacks.

sapVisual.name: SAP Token
sapVisual.tagline: Core token of the SAPMall ecosystem

productDetail.notFoundDesc: This item may be unavailable or the link is invalid. Head back to the mall to explore more.
productDetail.loadErrorDesc: We couldn't load this product right now. Please check your connection and try again.

discussions.title: Hear the community
discussions.subtitle: Discord is where we talk
discussions.description: Share ideas on product, governance, and the ecosystem in channels. Discussion builds consensus; on-chain votes make decisions.

proposals.title: On-chain proposals
proposals.subtitle: Vote to shape Sapphire Mall
proposals.description: Browse active and past proposals. Connect your wallet to vote—every yes or no writes the rules of the ecosystem.

events.title: Governance milestones
events.subtitle: AMAs, grants, and milestones
events.description: Follow community AMAs, grant rounds, and key milestones so you never miss a critical moment.

events.footnote: Grants and milestones sync to the governance board

e1.title: May community AMA: roadmap & Q2 milestones
e1.excerpt: Core team covers tokenomics, marketplace fee buybacks, and Grant season 2 timing, with live Q&A.

e2.title: Grant season 2 opens · 50,000 USDT pool
e2.excerpt: Applications open for dev tools, community ops, and integrations. First cohort announced early June.

e3.title: Milestone: DAO governance live on mainnet
e3.excerpt: On-chain proposals, voting, and delegation are live—connect your wallet to participate.

e4.title: Notice: voting window rules updated
e4.excerpt: Active proposal voting extended from 5 to 7 days; quorum changes posted on the forum.

e5.title: Recap: April ecosystem AMA highlights
e5.excerpt: NFT review SLA, multilingual docs, and Bags partnership—replay and transcript on the forum.

e6.title: Grant season 1 wrap-up: 12 projects funded
e6.excerpt: Wallet integrations, dashboards, and community bots—season 2 applications are open.

e7.title: Ecosystem weekly: governance participation above 65%
e7.excerpt: On-chain votes, delegation, and forum stats with next month's governance calendar.

e8.title: Notice: marketplace fee allocation details
e8.excerpt: Buyback, treasury, and community incentive ratios and execution schedule.

e9.title: June AMA: multichain rollout & wallet roadmap
e9.excerpt: Tech lead on EVM-compatible chains and testnet milestones.

e10.title: Grant focus: developer tooling track
e10.excerpt: Fast-track reviews for SDKs, indexers, and monitoring tools.

e11.title: Notice: governance maintenance window
e11.excerpt: Contract parameter upgrade on Jun 2; voting briefly paused.

p1.title: Adjust SAP staking rewards
p1.summary: Propose an 8%–12% APR range and a 30-day unlock period.

p2.title: Marketplace fee buyback plan
p2.summary: Allocate 20% of marketplace fees to SAP buybacks and the treasury.

p3.title: Grant Season 2 budget notice
p3.summary: Allocate 50,000 USDT for dev tools and community ops grants.

p4.title: Governance multisig rotation
p4.summary: Nominate the next multisig roster with a 7-day review period.

p5.title: Digital rights listing standards
p5.summary: Define review flow and disclosure templates for NFTs and virtual goods.

p6.title: SAP token burn mechanism
p6.summary: Burn 50% of quarterly buybacks permanently; rest to treasury.

p7.title: Merchant deposit tier adjustment
p7.summary: Tiered deposit requirements to lower barriers for small merchants.

p8.title: Cross-chain bridge audit report
p8.summary: Publish third-party audit results and upcoming bug bounty scope.

p9.title: Treasury quarterly disclosure template
p9.summary: Standard format for on-chain flows, grants, and buybacks.

p10.title: Delegated voting defaults refresh
p10.summary: Per-proposal-type delegation rules for token holders.

p11.title: Merchant KYC tier standards revision
p11.summary: Tiered KYC by volume to simplify onboarding for small merchants.

d1.title: Wallet signing UX improvements
d1.excerpt: Feedback on mobile voting prompts and gas estimates—86 comments.

d2.title: Are marketplace fees fair by category?
d2.excerpt: Discuss differentiated fees and transparency requirements.

d3.title: Q3 community event ideas
d3.excerpt: Collect themes for meetups and AMAs—submit your ideas.

d5.title: NFT listing review SLA
d5.excerpt: Merchants want faster reviews—discuss SLA and expedited paths.

d6.title: New member onboarding refresh
d6.excerpt: Volunteer guide: connect wallet, vote, delegate in three steps.

d7.title: Vote notification channels
d7.excerpt: Email or Discord bot alerts when voting opens on new proposals.

d8.title: Virtual goods copyright disputes
d8.excerpt: Standard flow for buyer appeals and merchant evidence deadlines.

d9.title: Forum spam filtering rules
d9.excerpt: Auto-detection and manual review for low-quality posts.

d10.title: Staking yield calculator request
d10.excerpt: Show estimated returns and unlock timelines by lock period.

d11.title: DAO page mobile layout feedback
d11.excerpt: Usability issues on small screens for lists and vote actions.

proposalCreate.pageLead: Fill in proposal details and the voting window. After submission, the proposal enters community review and on-chain voting (demo).
proposalCreate.demoCallout: Demo: drafts are stored in your browser. Production will integrate Snapshot / on-chain governance.

placeholders.title: e.g. Adjust SAP staking reward parameters
placeholders.summary: 1–2 sentences on the problem and expected impact
placeholders.motivation: Describe the current state, the issue, and why this proposal is needed…
placeholders.specification:
One item per line, e.g.:
- Adjust staking APR band
- Add a 30-day unlock period
placeholders.callout: Voter notes, risks, or treasury impact

proposalCreate.specificationHint: One spec item per line; rendered as a bullet list
proposalCreate.votingWindowHint: We recommend at least 5 days for community discussion.
proposalCreate.submitConfirmBody: This will enter the governance review flow. Demo mode does not submit on-chain—confirm your content first.
proposalCreate.discardBody: This clears the local draft and returns to the list. Unsaved changes will be lost.

validation.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date

voteCard.connectHint: Connect your wallet to view governance stats and vote on this proposal.

voteCard.notParticipated: You did not participate in this proposal

default.p1: This proposal adjusts Sapphire Mall governance or protocol parameters. Read the full text and join the forum before voting.
default.callout: Demo: results and thresholds are mocked—production uses on-chain governance contracts.

p1.p1: Staking incentive parameters have run for several quarters; the community requested better long-term holder yields without sacrificing safety.
bullets1: Adjust community staking APR band to 8%–12%
Add a 30-day unlock; early exit forfeits 5% of rewards
Changes apply to new stakes only until the next epoch
p1.callout: Review the treasury impact assessment before voting (demo).

p3.p1: Grant Season 2 funds developer tools, community ops, and integrations; a community-led committee will review applications.
bullets1: 50,000 USDT pool across three tranches
8,000 USDT cap per project
Grantees submit monthly milestone reports
p3.callout: Voting has not started—see the window above.

p4.p1: The new multisig roster was public on the forum for 7 days with no valid objections; this proposal confirms it on-chain.
bullets1: 5/7 multisig, 4 signatures required
12-month term, one renewal allowed
Outgoing members barred from the same role for 30 days
p4.callout: This proposal is closed and passed (demo archive).

eventDetail.notFound: Event not found—it may have been removed or the link is invalid.

e1.intro: The May community AMA is open to all Sapphire Mall holders and contributors. The core team will walk through the Q2 governance roadmap, fee buyback mechanics, and Grant Season 2 timing.
e1.coverCaption: Event illustration · Full replay will be posted to the forum
e1.p1: Topics include token economics, marketplace fee allocation, and the Grant application process, plus an open Q&A.
bullets1: Q2 governance module iterations and delegation UX
Timing and on-chain reporting for the 20% SAP buyback
Grant Season 2 categories and review workflow
Bags partnership and multi-chain milestone updates
e1.p2: Live on Discord voice; a transcript and replay link will be published within 48 hours after the session.
e1.callout: This page is an archived briefing for reading only—join Discord for live participation.

e2.intro: Grant Season 2 is now open with a 50,000 USDT pool for developer tools, community programs, and ecosystem integrations.
bullets1: Developer tools: SDKs, indexers, monitoring, and debugging
Community ops: localization, meetups, and onboarding
Integrations: wallet, payments, and bridge PoCs
e2.p1: A community-led committee will publish the first shortlist in early June with staged payouts.
e2.callout: Application guides and forms are pinned on the forum (demo).

e3.intro: Sapphire Mall DAO governance is live on mainnet—connect your wallet to vote on proposals.
e3.coverCaption: Governance dashboard synced with on-chain state (demo)
e3.p1: Proposal browsing, voting, delegation, and result publishing are available for parameter and treasury governance.
bullets1: On-chain proposal tracking
For / against voting with a connected wallet
Delegation and quorum visualization
Historical proposal archive
e3.p2: Maintenance windows and parameter upgrades will be announced as separate events on this page.

e4.intro: Active proposal voting windows extend from 5 to 7 days to improve participation; quorum changes are posted on the forum.
e4.p1: New rules apply to proposals entering vote after publication; in-flight votes keep their original window.
e4.callout: See the forum announcement for the full parameter table.

e5.intro: April AMA highlights cover NFT listing review, localization docs, and Bags partnership progress.
e5.p1: Replay and transcript are on the forum for members in other time zones.
e5.callout: Watch for the June AMA teaser soon.

e6.intro: Grant Season 1 closed with 12 funded projects across wallet integrations, dashboards, and community bots.
e6.p1: Progress updates will appear on the governance board; Season 2 applications are open.
e6.callout: Season 1 roster is archived on the forum.

e7.intro: This week's ecosystem report shows governance participation above 65%, with on-chain votes, delegation, and forum stats.
e7.p1: Includes next month's governance calendar for planning votes and discussions.

e8.intro: Marketplace fee allocation is published: buyback, treasury injection, and community incentives with execution cadence.
e8.p1: Details will move on-chain after a parameter governance proposal passes.
e8.callout: Public comment period is open on the forum.

e9.intro: The June AMA previews multi-chain deployment and wallet support with testnet timelines from engineering.
e9.p1: Time and channel links will be updated here one week before go-live.
e9.callout: Submit questions on the forum in advance.

e10.intro: A focused Grant track fast-tracks SDKs, indexers, and monitoring tools.
e10.p1: Include an open-source repo, demo video, and milestone plan.

e11.intro: Governance contracts upgrade on June 2 overnight UTC; voting pauses briefly during maintenance.
e11.p1: Services resume automatically—no action required unless we post otherwise.
e11.callout: Report issues on the forum if anything looks off.

discussionDetail.notFound: Discussion not found. It may have been removed or the link is invalid.
discussionDetail.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to respond.

composer.title: Post a reply
composer.placeholder: Share your view, add context, or ask a question…

default.intro: This thread is for community discussion on Sapphire Mall governance and product direction. Please stay constructive and cite data when you can.
default.p1: Explain background, expected impact, and verifiable references. For treasury or parameter changes, link the on-chain proposal when possible.
default.callout: Demo: replies are stored in your browser. Production will use forum or signed off-chain messages.

1.body: Support this direction—please add impact on existing users.

2.body: We're scheduling an internal review and will share a comparison table this week.

3.body: Can you add the related proposal ID in your reply for cross-reference?

d1.intro: Mobile wallet signing and gas estimates during voting strongly affect participation. This thread collects feedback and UI improvements.
d1.p1: Most reports mention too many signing steps, unclear network prompts, and a crowded confirmation screen.
bullets1: Combine connect + network switch into one guided flow
Show estimated gas and SAP voting weight before confirm
Preserve vote choice on retry after failure
d1.callout: Product will prioritize the first two items in the next DApp release (demo note).

replies.r1: On iOS MetaMask in-app browser the popup is often hidden—please detect and warn.
replies.r2: Noted. We'll add in-app browser QA and consider a desktop calldata fallback.
replies.r3: +1. Showing network and contract summary on the vote page would help.

d2.intro: Should marketplace fees vary more by category, and how should we disclose them to buyers and merchants?
d2.p1: The community suggests tiers by risk, fulfillment complexity, and dispute history—not a flat rate—with on-chain or in-app fee breakdown per order.
bullets1: Different models for digital goods vs physical goods
Trusted-merchant discounts with clear KPIs
14-day notice + governance vote for fee changes
d2.callout: If consensus forms, we'll draft a parameter proposal (demo).

replies.r1: Please publish last quarter's category fee and dispute stats (anonymized).
replies.r2: Ops can share an aggregate table next week in this thread.
replies.r3: Tiered fees make sense—flat fees hurt small merchants.

d3.intro: Call for Q3 community events: Meetups, AMAs, hackathons, and onboarding workshops.
d3.p1: Reply with format, audience, scale, and resources needed. Selected topics enter Grant or community fund review.
bullets1: Deadline: June 30
Prefer multi-language and cross-timezone design
Workshops tied to governance voting or marketplace UX welcome

proposalRules.title: Proposal rules
proposalRules.intro: On-chain governance follows an open, verifiable process. Summary of Sapphire Mall community proposal rules.
proposalRules.footnote: Thresholds and parameters are defined per proposal and on-chain contracts.

submit.title: Who can submit
submit.desc: Wallets holding SAP or meeting published community thresholds may submit proposals with title, summary, and executable actions.

window.title: Voting window
window.desc: Standard proposals typically run 3–7 days; major treasury or protocol changes may use extended windows with prior notice.

quorum.title: Quorum
quorum.desc: A minimum participation rate must be met for a result to count; otherwise the proposal fails automatically.

vote.title: How to vote
vote.desc: One address, one vote. Connect your wallet and submit an on-chain transaction during the voting period (for, against, or abstain as listed).

execute.title: Passage & execution
execute.desc: Passed proposals enter a timelock before execution; outcomes and transaction hashes are visible on the governance dashboard.

sidebar.title: My participation
sidebar.connectHint: Connect your wallet to view your governance activity.

checkout.stubDesc: Checkout is under development. Add items to cart and complete your order in the admin portal for now.
